input.initialPrompt: Run coverage analysis on this project. Coverage data is already in TestResults/coverage.cobertura.xml.

data.reasoningText: The user wants me to run coverage analysis on the project. They mention that coverage data is already in TestResults/coverage.cobertura.xml. Let me look at what's available and generate a coverage report from that file.
